task_completion.description: Verify that the three required Clearance Departments have been created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a table or list in the Sentrifugo Separation module (Clearance Departments section) showing 'IT Asset Recovery', 'Financial Settlement', and 'Facilities & Access'.

task_completion.description: Verify that Jessica Liu is assigned as a Clearance User for Financial Settlement.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a table or list in the Clearance Users section of the Separation module showing 'Jessica Liu' mapped to the 'Financial Settlement' department.

task_completion.description: Verify that users are assigned for IT Asset Recovery and Facilities & Access.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Clearance Users section showing 'Kevin Robinson' (or a similar name like Kevin Hernandez) mapped to 'IT Asset Recovery', and 'Amanda White' (or Amanda Davis) mapped to 'Facilities & Access'.

task_completion.description: Verify that 3 Exit Checklist Questions are added for IT Asset Recovery.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Exit Checklist section in the Separation module showing exactly 3 distinct questions mapped to the 'IT Asset Recovery' department.

task_completion.description: Verify that 2 Exit Checklist Questions are added for Financial Settlement.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Exit Checklist section in the Separation module showing exactly 2 distinct questions mapped to the 'Financial Settlement' department.

task_completion.description: Verify that 2 Exit Checklist Questions are added for Facilities & Access.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Exit Checklist section in the Separation module showing exactly 2 distinct questions mapped to the 'Facilities & Access' department.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent used the Sentrifugo web interface to configure the settings.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent navigating the Sentrifugo web application in a browser, rather than executing SQL scripts or API commands in a terminal.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent opened and read the corporate directive.
integrity.visual_evidence: Early screenshots should show the agent opening '~/Desktop/exit_clearance_directive.txt' in a text editor or using a terminal command like 'cat' to read its contents.

integrity.description: Verify that the results are in the actual Sentrifugo application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface should be the genuine Sentrifugo HRMS UI without signs of a mock HTML page or text editor being passed off as the application.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires configuring the Sentrifugo Separation module. Expected Clearance Departments: 'IT Asset Recovery', 'Financial Settlement', 'Facilities & Access'. Expected Clearance Users: 'Jessica Liu' for Financial Settlement, 'Kevin Robinson' for IT Asset Recovery, and 'Amanda White' for Facilities & Access. Note: Kevin Robinson and Amanda White do not exist in the default database (only Kevin Hernandez and Amanda Davis exist), so the agent may have created them or used the closest matches. Expected Exit Checklist Questions: 3 for IT Asset Recovery, 2 for Financial Settlement, 2 for Facilities & Access.
